item.title: systemd-analyze
item.description: Subcommands time: analyze startup time set-log-level: set systemd log level .

item.title: Projectile
item.description: Projects Broadly speaking, Projectile identifies projects like this: Directories that contain the special .projectile file Directories under version control (e.g ...

item.title: Module Search Path
item.description: sys.path is initialized from these locations: The directory containing the input script (or the current directory when no file is specified). PYTHONPATH (a list of directory names, with the same syntax as the shell variable PATH).

item.title: Service Level Indicator
item.description: Be Realistic Sometimes only a proxy is available. For example, client-side latency is often the more user-relevant metric, but it might only be possible to measure latency at the server.

item.title: Krita
item.description: Pen Tablet Shortcuts Shift + drag left/right to resize the brush. Button (close to pen tip) + drag to zoom in and out. SPACE + drag to move the canvas. Shift + SPACE + drag to rotate the canvas.

item.title: AWS Documentation Excerpts
item.description: Aurora MySQL JDBC Drivers Amazon Web Services (AWS) JDBC Driver for MySQL github.com/awslabs/aws-mysql-jdbc The AWS JDBC Driver for MySQL supports fast failover for Amazon Aurora ...

item.title: DevOps Roadmap
item.description: mindmap root((DevOps)) Development Project Management Platform Support Coding and Architecture Effort Estimation Continuous Integration Unit & Integration Testing Static ...

item.title: Grafana Dashboards
item.description: Issues Encountered Broken Links $__cell does not work in the latest Grafana table panel. Replace them with ${__value.text} instead. Dashboard Examples github.com/portefaix/portefaix-kubernetes/tree/8e46651ba91f724c938b6aa5108f32979c179c56/gitops/argocd/charts/monitoring/kube-prometheus-stack/dashboards (K8s and node exporter) github.com/VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaMetrics/tree/master/dashboards/vm (VictoriaMetrics) github.com/Vonng/pigsty/tree/master/files/grafana (PostgreSQL as a service) See also Grafana Visualizations.

item.title: Alternative Storage for Prometheus
item.description: Grafana Mimir Mimir was forked from Cortex to open source some of their work under a more restrictive license (AGPLv3). See grafana.com/blog/2022/03/30/announcing-grafana-mimir/ for a feature comparison table.
